description_long: This is a thick, rectangular hardcover book with a deep red cover bordered by a thin green line. The cover is plain, lacking any visible illustration or text, and has a glossy finish that reflects light. The book's spine and edges are also red, matching the cover, and the pages are a uniform off-white color, visible along the sides. The book appears to be of medium to large size, suitable for use as a textbook or reference volume. Its construction suggests durability, with a hard outer shell and tightly bound pages. The overall appearance is simple and classic, with no decorative elements or embellishments.
description: A thick, glossy red hardcover book with a green border and plain, unadorned cover. The pages are off-white and the book has a sturdy, classic appearance.
description_view_0: The book is seen from an angled perspective, showing the red cover with a green border and the off-white pages along the side.
description_view_1: This side view highlights the thickness of the book and the horizontal lines of the off-white pages, with the red cover forming a thin top edge.
description_view_2: Another angled view similar to view 0, emphasizing the book's depth and the contrast between the red cover and the pages.
description_view_3: A top-down view showing the entire red cover bordered by green, with no visible text or illustration.
attribute_spine_design: The spine is red and plain, with no visible text or decorative elements. It matches the color and style of the front cover.
